title: RapiDoc Events
description: Custom events emitted by the rapi-doc web component that can be listened to for integration with application logic.

spec-loaded.description: Fired when the OpenAPI spec is successfully parsed and loaded.

before-try.description: Fired before a Try It request is sent. Can be used to modify the request.

detail.description: Request details including URL, method, headers, and body.

after-try.description: Fired after a Try It request completes. Contains the response data.

detail.description: Response details including status, headers, and body.

api-server-change.description: Fired when the user selects a different API server from the server list.

selectedServer.description: The newly selected server object from the spec.

before-render.description: Fired before the component renders the spec. Can be used to modify the spec before display.

detail.description: The spec data about to be rendered.
